headlineLabel: In 2009, Twitter made What’s happening? the pulse of digital communities. Human Conversation is the What’s happening? of real-world communities.
headlineText: Twitter · 2009Digital communitiestwitter Nov 19 · 2009What’s happening?One question became the pulse of digital communities.One question. Two worlds.The next community revolutionReal-world communitiesHuman Conversationis the “What’s happening?” of real-world communities.
ledeText: All the human, social, relationship, and community data moves through human conversation.
storyMarkers: Human Conversation is the only place where connection, and human, social, and community data flows.
